failed_attempts:
simp only [List.length_map] at heq
        exact (List.length_map w' Subtype.val).symm ▸ (List.length_map w Subtype.val).symm ▸ 
          congrArg List.length heq.symm ▸ rfl
      · intro h
        have heq_len : w.length = w'.length := by
          have h1 : (List.map Subtype.val w).length = (List.map Subtype.val w').length := congrArg List.length heq
          simp only [List.length_map] at h1
          exact h1
        have h' : i < w'.length := heq_len ▸ h
        have : w.get ⟨i, h⟩ = w'.get ⟨i, h'⟩ := by
          have := congrFun (congrArg List.get heq)
          simp only [List.get_map] at this
          have h2 := this ⟨i, by simp [h]⟩
          simp at h2
          exact Subtype.ext h2
        exact this
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

some a =>
          cases hw' : w'.get? i with
          | none => simp [hw', List.get?_eq_none] at h'
          | some a' =>
            simp [hw, hw'] at this
            exact Subtype.ext this
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

some a =>
          cases hw' : w'.get? i with
          | none => simp only [List.get?_eq_none] at hw'; omega
          | some b =>
            simp only [hw, hw', Option.map_some'] at this
            have := Option.some.inj this
            exact Subtype.val_injective this
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

simp only [List.length_map] at heq
        exact (List.length_map w' Subtype.val ▸ heq.symm ▸ List.length_map w Subtype.val).symm
      · intro h
        have h' : i < w'.length := by
          simp only [List.length_map] at heq
          rw [← List.length_map w Subtype.val, ← List.length_map w' Subtype.val, heq]
          exact h
        have : w.get ⟨i, h⟩ = w'.get ⟨i, h'⟩ := by
          apply Subtype.ext
          have eq1 : (w.map Subtype.val).get ⟨i, by simp; exact h⟩ = (w.get ⟨i, h⟩).val := List.get_map _ _ _
          have eq2 : (w'.map Subtype.val).get ⟨i, by simp; exact h'⟩ = (w'.get ⟨i, h'⟩).val := List.get_map _ _ _
          rw [← eq1, ← eq2, heq]
        exact this
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

some val =>
          cases hw''' : w'.get? i with
          | none => simp_all
          | some val' =>
            simp only [hw'', hw''', Option.map_some'] at this
            have : val.val = val'.val := Option.some_injective _ this
            exact Subtype.ext this
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

    have : w = w' := by
      unfold coerceWord at heq
      exact List.map_injective_iff.mp (fun _ _ h => Subtype.val_injective h) heq
    rw [this]
    exact hw'

simp only [List.length_map] at heq
        exact (List.length_map w' (fun t => t.val)).symm ▸ 
              (List.length_map w (fun t => t.val)).symm ▸ 
              (congrArg List.length heq).symm ▸ rfl
      · intro h
        have h' : i < w'.length := by
          have := congrArg List.length heq
          simp only [List.length_map] at this
          omega
        have := List.getElem_map (fun t => t.val) w i h
        have := List.getElem_map (fun t => t.val) w' i h'
        have heq_i : (w.map (fun t => t.val))[i] = (w'.map (fun t => t.val))[i] := by
          have hlen : (w.map (fun t => t.val)).length = (w'.map (fun t => t.val)).length := by
            simp only [List.length_map]
            have := congrArg List.length heq
            simp only [List.length_map] at this
            exact this
          have hi' : i < (w'.map (fun t => t.val)).length := by simp; exact h'
          rw [heq]
        simp only [List.getElem_map] at heq_i
        exact Subtype.ext heq_i
    rw [this]
    exact hw'
